message:
🐛 fix sidebar search: multi-term, case-insensitive, EPG, click targets

- Sidebar search now splits by spaces and matches ALL terms (AND logic)
- Search includes channel name, group, and current EPG programme
- Search across ALL channels regardless of selected group when query active
- GestureDetector uses HitTestBehavior.opaque for full row click area
- Guide channel rows have grid lines (bottom + right border)
- Hint text updated to 'Search channels…'

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
